Description: PHP web application on EC2 with RDS MySQL 8.0. Custom VPC with public and private subnets, least-privilege IAM role, PHP 8.2 via amazon-linux-extras, and CreationPolicy signaling.

DBName.ConstraintDescription: Must start with a letter, alphanumeric only.

DBUsername.ConstraintDescription: Must start with a letter, alphanumeric only.

DBPassword.Description: RDS master password. Injected via GEN-PASSWORD.

LinuxUsername.ConstraintDescription: Lowercase letters and numbers only, must start with a letter.
LinuxUsername.Description: Linux OS username for the EC2 instance.

LinuxPassword.Description: Linux OS password. Injected via GEN-PASSWORD.

CloudLabsDeploymentID.ConstraintDescription: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.

Properties.GroupDescription: Allow HTTP port 80 and SSH port 22 inbound to EC2 web server

SecurityGroupIngress.Description: RDP access for CloudLabs Direct Web Connect
HTTPS - nginx SSL proxy for RDP over HTTPS

Properties.GroupDescription: Allow MySQL port 3306 inbound only from EC2 security group

SecurityGroupIngress.Description: MySQL only from EC2SecurityGroup - not from internet

WebAppURL.Description: Web application URL - open in browser after stack is CREATE_COMPLETE

EC2ElasticIP.Description: Static Elastic IP of the EC2 web server

LinuxUsername.Description: Linux username for RDP login via CloudLabs Direct Web Connect

RDPConnection.Description: RDP endpoint for CloudLabs Direct Web Connect

SSHCommand.Description: SSH command - password based, no key pair needed

RDPoverHTTPS.Description: RDP over HTTPS via nginx SSL proxy
